name: Burgers Santa Fe
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground beef or ground turkey
1 t Ground cumin or chili powder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine ground beef, 3/4 cup cheese, 1/4 cup salsa, crushed tortilla chips, thinly sliced green onions, cumin, and garlic salt. Mix together lightly but thoroughly.
2. Shape into 4 patties that are approximately 1/2 inch thick.
3. Grill or broil the patties on an oiled rack, 5-6 inches away from heat, for 5-6 minutes on each side, or until the internal temperature reaches 160°F.
4. Grill or lightly toast the hamburger buns in the broiler.
5. Place the burgers on the buns and top with the remaining salsa. Sprinkle with the remaining cheese. Serve with lettuce and tomato if desired.
Submitted by Marina
Source: Sargento cheese, Great summer recipes
